description_long: This is a single-story modern bungalow surrounded by a low hedge and a dark perimeter fence, featuring a spacious front yard with a driveway and a double garage. The structure has a light-colored facade with multiple large windows, a dark gabled roof, and a well-maintained lawn both in the front and back. The front entrance is accentuated by a paved walkway and minimal landscaping, including small shrubs and two prominent white-blossomed trees. The rear of the bungalow opens to a large, open green space, ideal for recreational use. The property is enclosed by a combination of dark fencing and a wooden gate at the back. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, symmetry, and a contemporary suburban aesthetic.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a light facade, dark gabled roof, large windows, and landscaped front and back yards, enclosed by a dark fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, double garage, paved walkway, symmetrical windows, and landscaped front yard with hedges and white-blossomed trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the bungalow, the garage, and the transition from the front yard to the expansive backyard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large backyard, rear-facing windows, and the wooden gate integrated into the dark perimeter fence.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side lawn, additional windows, and the continuation of the perimeter fencing and landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and rear windows
